zh.Werle,Mecklenburg-Schwerin,Germany: 海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nikolaus I von Mecklenburg zu Werle於1210年出生在德國梅可倫波-沃爾包莫史維林時，他的父親Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg41歲，母親Kristina Sverkersdotter25歲。他於大約1231年與Jutta of Anhalt結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1277年10月14日在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 梅可倫波-史維林斯塔特 普勞普勞享年67歲，埋葬在德國福萊斯塔阿特 梅可倫波-史維林斯塔特 多朗多朗。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nikolaus I von Mecklenburg zu Werle于1210年出生在德国梅可倫波-沃爾包莫史維林时，他的父亲Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg41岁，母亲Kristina Sverkersdotter25岁。他于大约1231年与Jutta of Anhalt结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1277年10月14日在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 梅可倫波-史維林斯塔特 普勞普勞享年67岁，埋葬在德国福萊斯塔阿特 梅可倫波-史維林斯塔特 多朗多朗。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of Welsh   Vaughan  .
Chinese: variant of   Wong  .
Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Mecklenburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the province of this name in northern Germany, so called from Old Saxon mikil ‘big, great’ + burg ‘castle’. Amongst Jews this may have been acquired alternatively as an artificial name.

variants.name: Mekelburg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Helmut.
German: variant of Meckelburg, itself a variant of Mecklenburg .

nameMeanings.name: zu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 祖, meaning ‘ancestors’ in Chinese: (i) from the first element of the personal names Zu Jia (祖甲), Zu Yi (祖乙), Zu Xin (祖辛), Zu Ding (祖丁), and Zu Geng (祖庚), personal names of several kings during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). (ii) from the first element of the personal names of Zu Ji (祖己) and Zu Yin (祖尹), who were descendants of an official called Zhong Hui who lived some time during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ).

Mandarin form of the surname 俎, meaning ‘sacrificial utensil’ in ancient Chinese: (i) adopted as a surname by the Bao Zu (鮑俎) family from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (ii) said to be adopted by the fourth son of the uncle of the famous general Yue Fei (1103–1142  AD ), who changed the original surname Zhu (祝) to Zu (俎) in order to escape from political persecutions.

variants.name: Tsu
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Chen, Chi, Ching, Kin, Kung, Kuo, Yuk.  Vietnamese Mui, Loc.
Chinese:
alternative Mandarin forms of the Chinese surnames 祖 and 俎, see   Zu  .

nameMeanings.name: Werle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Dieter, Heiner, Heinz.
German: from a pet form of the personal name   Werner  .

variants.name: Werlein
meanings: German: variant of   Werle  .

variants.name: Werley
meanings: Americanized form of German   Werle  .

variants.name: Werner
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Hans, Erwin, Heinz, Gerhard, Ernst, Helmut, Horst, Klaus, Arno, Dieter.

German, Dutch, Polish, Czech, Hungarian, Norwegian, Swedish, and Danish: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’ + heri, hari ‘army’. The surname of German origin is also found in Britain (compare Warner ) and France (Alsace and Lorraine). Compare Verner .
Germanized or Americanized form of Czech, Hungarian, Swedish, Danish, Croatian, and Slovenian   Verner  , a cognate or variant of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Nikolaus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Greek. See Nicholas .

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

en.lifeSummary: When Nikolaus I von Mecklenburg zu Werle was born in 1210, in Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germany, his father, Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg, was 41 and his mother, Kristina Sverkersdotter, was 25. He married Jutta of Anhalt about 1231. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 14 October 1277, in Plau, Plau, Mecklenburg-Schwerin, at the age of 67, and was buried in Doberan, Doberan, Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nikolaus I von Mecklenburg zu Werle est né en 1210, à Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Allemagne, son père, Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Kristina Sverkersdotter, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Jutta of Anhalt environ 1231. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 14 octobre 1277, à Plau, Stadt Plau, Großherzogtum Mecklenburg-Schwerin, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Doberan, Stadt Doberan, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nikolaus I von Mecklenburg zu Werle 1210 in Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg 41 und seine Mutter Kristina Sverkersdotter 25. Er hat um 1231 Jutta of Anhalt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Oktober 1277 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Plau, Stadt Plau, Großherzogtum Mecklenburg-Schwerin und wurde in Doberan, Stadt Doberan, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Deutschland begraben.

Lui sposato Jutta of Anhalt circa 1231. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 14 ottobre 1277, nel Plau, Stadt Plau, Großherzogtum Mecklenburg-Schwerin, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Doberan, Stadt Doberan, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Nikolaus I von Mecklenburg zu Werleが1210年にドイツメックレンブルグ-ボルプオンメルンスチウエリンで生まれた時，父Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburgは41歳，母Kristina Sverkersdotterは25歳であった。約1231年にJutta of Anhaltと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1277年10月14日にグロssハーゾグトゥム メックレンブルグ-スチウエリンスタト プラウプラウで67歳で死去し，ドイツフレイスタアト メックレンブルグ-スチウエリンスタト ドバーアンドバーアンにて埋葬された。

ko.Doberaner Münster, Doberan, Mecklenburg,: 독일 프레이스타앳 클렌버그-슈워인 스타드트 도베란 도베란
ko.lifeSummary: Nikolaus I von Mecklenburg zu Werle(이)가 1210년 독일 클렌버그-보르폼머 슈워인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Kristina Sverkersdotter(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1231년 Jutta of Anhalt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1277년 10월 14일 그로ss헤어즈그투 클렌버그-슈워인 스타드트 플로 플로에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 프레이스타앳 클렌버그-슈워인 스타드트 도베란 도베란에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nikolaus I von Mecklenburg zu Werle nasceu em 1210, em Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemanha, seu pai, Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Kristina Sverkersdotter, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Jutta of Anhalt aproximadamente 1231. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de outubro de 1277, em Plau, Stadt Plau, Großherzogtum Mecklenburg-Schwerin, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Doberan, Stadt Doberan, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nikolaus I von Mecklenburg zu Werle родился в 1210 г. в местности щвирин, меккленбург-ворпоммирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Kristina Sverkersdotter, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Jutta of Anhalt около 1231 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 14 октября 1277 г. в местности плау, стадт плау, гроssхирзогтум меккленбург-щвирин в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности добиран, стадт добиран, фристаат меккленбург-щвирин, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nikolaus I von Mecklenburg zu Werle nació en 1210, en Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemania, su papá, Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Kristina Sverkersdotter, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Jutta of Anhalt aproximadamente 1231. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 14 de octubre de 1277, en Plau, Stadt Plau, Großherzogtum Mecklenburg-Schwerin, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Doberan, Stadt Doberan, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Alemania.
